about.heroDesc: We believe that books have the power to change lives. Our mission is to connect readers with stories that inspire, educate, and spark imagination.
about.storyPara1: Founded with a simple idea — to make quality books accessible to everyone — our bookstore has grown from a small passion project into a thriving community of book lovers.
about.storyPara2: We started by curating a small collection of must-read titles and have since expanded to offer thousands of books across every genre imaginable. From timeless classics to the latest bestsellers, we have something for every reader.
about.storyPara3: What sets us apart is our dedication to the reading experience. We don't just sell books — we help you discover your next favorite story.
about.quote: A reader lives a thousand lives before he dies.
about.chooseDesc: We're committed to providing the best experience for every book lover.
about.valueCollectionDesc: Every book in our store is carefully selected to ensure quality content that inspires, educates, and entertains.
about.valueDeliveryDesc: We partner with trusted logistics providers to deliver your books safely and swiftly to your doorstep.
about.valuePricesDesc: Enjoy competitive pricing and regular promotions. Great books should be accessible to everyone.
about.valueSupportDesc: Our dedicated support team is always ready to help you with any questions or concerns.
about.ctaTitle: Ready to Find Your Next Read?
about.ctaDesc: Browse our collection and discover books that will captivate your mind.

contact.heroDesc: Have a question, suggestion, or just want to say hello? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.formSuccess: Thank you for your message! We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

moods.window_staring: The world sleeps and you sit by the window at 1am

banner.title: New Releases This Week
banner.description: It's time to update your reading list with some of the latest and greatest releases in the literary world. From heart-pumping thrillers to captivating memoirs, this week's new releases offer something for everyone.

profile.goalUpdated: Your reading goal has been updated.
profile.progressMsg: You've completed {{progress}}% of your goal. Keep going!
profile.bookshelfEmptyDesc: Start your reading journey with your first book!
profile.diaryEmpty: Your diary has no entries yet.
profile.diaryEmptyDesc: Leave your thoughts after finishing a book!
profile.personaFictionDesc: For you, every page is a painting, every word is a melody. You don't just read, you feel the beauty woven into every character's soul.
profile.personaClassicDesc: You seek timeless values. The greatest minds in history are your companions on your intellectual journey.
profile.personaSelfHelpDesc: You are the version that never stops upgrading. You read to change, to act, and to become the most brilliant version of yourself every day.
profile.personaMysteryDesc: No mystery can stump you. You love mind-bending twists and are always ready to dive into the most dramatic corners of psychology.
profile.personaDefaultDesc: You are an open-minded reader who enjoys all genres, never confined to one school of thought. You read like an explorer.
